features: BABY SOFT: Cotton Tree Baby Zinc & Castor Oil Cream, moisturises delicate skin. Adding moisture and preventing nappy rash.
2 in 1 CREAM: Cotton Tree Baby Zinc & Castor Oil Cream, soothe your baby's skin in a soft and gentle way. The delicate 2-in-1 formula helps to protect against irritated skin and nappy rash.
EVERYDAY USE: Cotton Tree Baby Zinc & Castor Oil Cream, formulated for use during the day, night or as baby requires to comfort and moisturise.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Zinc & Castor Oil Cream, 200ml
Safety warning: keep out of the reach of chidren and babies
